About Edwardsville

Edwardsville High School, located in the bustling town of Edwardsville, IL, is a highly educational institution that offers outstanding academic and extracurricular opportunities to its students. Renowned for its commitment to excellence, EHS boasts a thriving athletics program that instills a sense of teamwork, discipline, and sportsmanship in its students. The school is affiliated with a state athletics association, which ensures that the athletic programs at Edwardsville High School adhere to the highest standards. The association provides a platform for student-athletes to showcase their skills and compete at a competitive level while fostering a healthy and supportive environment. With a wide range of athletic offerings, including basketball, soccer, track and field, and more, EHS encourages its students to explore and excel in their individual passions and interests. Edwardsville High School stands as a shining example of how an educational institution can prioritize both academic achievement and athletic excellence. Its robust athletics programs, combined with the commitment to fostering a well-rounded educational experience, make it a sought-after school for students looking for a balanced and enriching high school journey.
